programme.title: Road Wars
programme.desc: See what happens when the sun goes down and rage levels up in this top ten episode.

programme.title: Road Wars
programme.desc: In Hawaii, an altercation between two motorists escalates after one of them appears to be holding a pocket knife; on a highway in Rawlins, Wyo., a snow storm turns a single accident into a pileup involving nearly 100 vehicles.

programme.title: Road Wars
programme.desc: One car appears to back into another at a car wash; an accident on a Los Angeles highway leads to several others, damaging six cars and injuring two motorists; a woman leaves her car without putting it into park.

programme.title: Road Wars
programme.desc: An altercation in an Ohio parking lot spirals out of control; disaster strikes when a bus driver in Atlanta appears to fall asleep at the wheel; an irate driver's wrath is unleashed on two friends in Oklahoma.

programme.title: Road Wars
programme.desc: New Jersey police pull over a city councilman; a semi barrels through a busy intersection in Washington; a motorist in Utah is challenged by a driver who appears to be brake checking; a family loading their car beside a busy road in Thailand ends up in the crosshairs of an oncoming vehicle; an SUV in Chicago following closely behind another vehicle gets an unpleasant surprise.

programme.title: Road Wars
programme.desc: In Canton, Ohio, a horn honk on the road allegedly leads to a man wreaking havoc on a woman's car; in Jonesboro, Ark., chaos ensues when a suspect manages to break free from his handcuffs and holds a lighter flame to the seat.

programme.title: Road Wars
programme.desc: A raging back and forth between three vehicles ends with a man being rammed head on by a truck; carjackers relentlessly pursue a terrified driver; an angry motorcyclist confronts a driver and is met with a baseball bat.

programme.title: Road Wars
programme.desc: In Missouri, a rideshare driver is repeatedly rammed by a trailing sedan for no apparent reason; a cyclist is thrown from his bike when an approaching car rear-ends him; a mechanic in Georgia has to answer to police.

programme.title: Road Wars
programme.desc: A man in Texas is pursued by an angry driver wielding a finger gun; a driver raging at two women in California is intercepted by two men who send him packing; a ride-share driver in Texas has food thrown in her face by an unruly passenger.

programme.title: Road Wars

programme.title: Open House: The Great Sex Experiment
programme.desc: Chelsea and George seek a threesome, but will it help Chelsea move past George's sexually adventurous past and infidelity? Jess and Ben host a naked dinner party.

programme.title: The Last Leg
programme.desc: Josh Pugh, Lorraine Kelly and Steve Bracknall join Adam Hills, Josh Widdicombe and Alex Brooker for a tongue-in-cheek look at the week's news.

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In South Wales, there's a power tussle in the kitchen, a shared appreciation of bargains, and a few home truths, as three couples compete to host the best dinner party.

programme.title: Kirstie's Fill Your House for Free
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and the team come to the rescue of Dave and Kate, whose house has been flooded.

programme.title: George Clarke's Old House New Home
programme.desc: George meets builder Anthony and physiotherapist Emily, who are determined to turn their ramshackle 17th-century cottage in Warwickshire into their family home.

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray, Rachel Riley and Susie Dent host, with Levi Roots in Dictionary Corner, as contestants race against the clock to pit their wits against vowels, consonants and numbers.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: When a classy customer falls for Carla, no one can work out why she's not interested. But it seems she's convinced that he must have some terrible flaw.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Sam's old buddy Dave insists that he can break up Sam's romance with Diane in just 24 hours, especially when Diane discovers Sam still has his 'little black book'.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: When Coach gets the chance to manage a youth league baseball team, his competitive nature soon turns him from a loveable guy into an angry tyrant.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: When Ray's parents fall out, his mum moves in with him and Debra. But Debra isn't happy and tries to convince Ray's dad to apologise.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra's well-to-do parents come to visit. Ray begs his own parents to be nice to them, but when they all go out for a meal, it proves a tall order..

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray decides to ignore his dad's poker advice in order to prove he doesn't need any help. But when he loses yet again, Debra wants him to ask for his money back.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Frasier and Niles desperately search for a wealthy patron to lend support to the failing prep school they both attended.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Frasier resigns from his beloved wine club to avoid a conflict of interest when he begins a new radio show about wine.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Niles's romantic chances could be scuppered when Daphne's return sparks a squabble that could end it all.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Frasier seeks advice from his mentor, who seems more interested in Roz. Daphne tries to convince Niles that she's psychic.

programme.title: 5 News at 5
programme.desc: Join Dan Walker and the team for the news that matters to you.

programme.title: Love Nature
programme.desc: The felling and fate of the Sycamore Gap tree caused sorrow among the public. But this film shows some of the inspiring responses to the loss of the century-old landmark.

programme.title: Susan Calman's Grand Day Out
programme.desc: the inspiration for romantic novelist Jilly Cooper. Susan visits Bisley, which was home to the author, Tewkesbury Abbey and Sudeley Castle.

programme.title: Do You Have OCD?
programme.desc: With expert insight and moving personal stories, this insightful documentary follows four people as they reveal the reality of obsessive-compulsive disorder, from terrifying thoughts to rituals.

programme.title: The Yorkshire Vet
programme.desc: A large African leopard tortoise struggles to walk on sore back legs and needs Peter Wright's help. Julian Norton faces a Kunekune pig. And vets and farmers compete on darts night.

programme.title: China with Ben Fogle

programme.title: Fare Dodgers: At War with the Law
programme.desc: Revenue Protection officer Sam from South Western Railway is cornered and verbally abused on a train to Feltham when a man without a ticket insists on confronting her on his journey.

programme.title: Call the Bailiffs: Time to Pay Up
programme.desc: The work of enforcement agents as they execute writs for people desperate to recover money they are owed. In Suffolk, officers call on a woman who owes a university almost £4k in rent.

programme.title: Police Code Zero: Officer Under Attack
programme.desc: Real-time footage showing the reality of frontline policing as they face attacks from those they try to protect. A simple traffic stop and breathalyser test turns violent.

programme.desc: Your one-stop-shop for all things cruise; bringing you the hottest destinations, ground-breaking ships and the latest deals to ensure your next cruise holiday is your greatest one.
